deploy.startCommand: mkdir -p storage/app/private storage/app/public storage/framework/cache storage/framework/sessions storage/framework/views && php artisan optimize:clear && for i in $(seq 1 10); do php artisan migrate --force && break || echo "Migration attempt $i failed, retrying in 5s..." && sleep 5; done && php artisan storage:link 2>/dev/null; php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
